zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam de Copplestone於大約1323年出生在英國戴文哈福德時，他的父親Richard de Coplestone II49歲，母親Gertrude Sherman24歲。他於1345年與Alice de Ferrers在英國戴文可雷迪頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1384年11月19日享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam de Copplestone于大约1323年出生在英国戴文哈福德时，他的父亲Richard de Coplestone II49岁，母亲Gertrude Sherman24岁。他于1345年与Alice de Ferrers在英国戴文可雷迪頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1384年11月19日享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: de

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam de Copplestone was born about 1323, in Chagford, Devon, England, his father, Richard de Coplestone II, was 49 and his mother, Gertrude Sherman, was 24. He married Alice de Ferrers in 1345, in Crediton, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 19 November 1384, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam de Copplestone est né environ 1323, à Chagford, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Coplestone II, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Gertrude Sherman, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Ferrers en 1345, à Crediton, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 19 novembre 1384, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam de Copplestone um 1323 in Chagford, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Coplestone II 49 und seine Mutter Gertrude Sherman 24. Er hat 1345 in Crediton, Devon, England Alice de Ferrers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 19. November 1384 im Alter von 62 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Copplestone è nato il circa 1323 nel Chagford, Devon, England, il suo padre, Richard de Coplestone II, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Gertrude Sherman, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Ferrers nel 1345, nel Crediton, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 19 novembre 1384, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Copplestoneが約1323年にイギリスデボンチャグフォードで生まれた時，父Richard de Coplestone IIは49歳，母Gertrude Shermanは24歳であった。1345年にイギリスデボンクレディトンでAlice de Ferrersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1384年11月19日に62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Copplestone(이)가 대략 1323년 영국 데폰 차그퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Coplestone II(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Gertrude Sherman(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1345년 영국 데폰 크레딧에서 Alice de Ferrers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1384년 11월 19일 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Copplestone nasceu aproximadamente 1323, em Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Coplestone II, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Gertrude Sherman, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Ferrers em 1345, em Crediton, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de novembro de 1384, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam de Copplestone родился около 1323 г. в местности чагфорд, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Coplestone II было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrude Sherman, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Ferrers в 1345 г. в местности кредитон, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 19 ноября 1384 г. в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam de Copplestone nació aproximadamente 1323, en Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Coplestone II, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Gertrude Sherman, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Alice de Ferrers en 1345, en Crediton, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 19 de noviembre de 1384, a la edad de 62 años.
